user calls to modules via delegatecall.      Implements IMessageHandlerV2 to receive CCTP messages from Client chains.      Architecture:      - This contract holds all state (via PrivacyPoolStorage)      - Modules contain logic and are called via delegatecall      - CCTP messages are received and routed to appropriate modules      Modules:      - ShieldModule: Local shields and incoming cross-chain shields      - TransactModule: Private transfers and unshields (local + cross-chain)      - MerkleModule: Merkle tree operations      - VerifierModule: SNARK proof verification","kind":"dev","methods":{"atomicCrossChainUnshield((((uint256,uint256),(uint256[2],uint256[2]),(uint256,uint256)),bytes32,bytes32[],bytes32[],(uint16,uint72,uint8,uint64,address,bytes32,(bytes32[4],bytes32,bytes32,bytes,bytes)[]),(bytes32,(uint8,address,uint256),uint120)),uint32,address,bytes32,uint256)":{"params":{"_transaction":"Transaction with unshield proof","destinationCaller":"Address allowed to call receiveMessage on Client (bytes32).        Use bytes32(0) to allow any relayer, or specify a relayer address for MEV protection.","destinationDomain":"Target client chain's CCTP domain","finalRecipient":"Address to receive USDC on client chain","maxFee":"Maximum CCTP relayer fee in USDC raw units (deducted from burn amount at protocol level, 0 = no fee)"},"returns":{"_0":"nonce CCTP message nonce"}},"getInsertionTreeNumberAndStartingIndex(uint256)":{"returns":{"startIndex":"Starting leaf index within that tree","treeNum":"Tree number where commitments will be inserted"}},"getVerificationKey(uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"_commitments":"Number of commitments","_nullifiers":"Number of nullifiers"},"returns":{"_0":"The verification key"}},"handleReceiveFinalizedMessage(uint32,bytes32,uint32,bytes)":{"details":"Called by TokenMessenger after CCTP attestation is verified and tokens minted.      USDC has already been minted to this contract.      Message format: BurnMessageV2 (see ICCTPV2.sol for byte layout)      - amount: Gross amount before fee deduction      - feeExecuted: Fee deducted (actualMint = amount - feeExecuted)      - hookData: Our CCTPPayload with shield data","params":{"finalityThresholdExecuted":"The finality threshold that was met (>=2000 for finalized)","messageBody":"BurnMessageV2 encoded message containing hookData","sender":"Sender address on source chain (as bytes32, typically remote TokenMessenger)"},"returns":{"_0":"success Always returns true on success (reverts on failure)"}},"handleReceiveUnfinalizedMessage(uint32,bytes32,uint32,bytes)":{"details":"We don't support fast finality in the POC"},"initialize(address,address,address,address,address,address,address,uint32,address)":{"params":{"_localDomain":"This chain's CCTP domain ID","_merkleModule":"Address of MerkleModule implementation","_messageTransmitter":"CCTP MessageTransmitter address","_owner":"Contract owner","_shieldModule":"Address of ShieldModule implementation","_tokenMessenger":"CCTP TokenMessenger address","_transactModule":"Address of TransactModule implementation","_usdc":"USDC token address","_verifierModule":"Address of VerifierModule implementation"}},"insertLeaves(bytes32[])":{"params":{"_leafHashes":"Array of leaf hashes to insert"}},"setPrivilegedShieldCaller(address,bool)":{"params":{"caller":"Address to configure (e.g. yield adapter)","privileged":"True to exempt from fees"}},"setRemotePool(uint32,bytes32)":{"params":{"domain":"CCTP domain ID of the remote chain","poolAddress":"Address of the remote contract (as bytes32)"}},"setShieldFee(uint120)":{"params":{"_feeBps":"Fee in basis points (50 = 0.50%)"}},"setTestingMode(bool)":{"details":"POC ONLY - bypasses SNARK verification","params":{"_enabled":"Whether to enable testing mode"}},"setTreasury(address)":{"params":{"_treasury":"Address to receive protocol fees"}},"setUnshieldFee(uint120)":{"params":{"_feeBps":"Fee in basis points (50 = 0.50%)"}},"setVerificationKey(uint256,uint256,(string,(uint256,uint256),(uint256[2],uint256[2]),(uint256[2],uint256[2]),(uint256[2],uint256[2]),(uint256,uint256)[]))":{"params":{"_commitments":"Number of commitments","_key":"The verification key","_nullifiers":"Number of nullifiers"}},"shield(((bytes32,(uint8,address,uint256),uint120),(bytes32[3],bytes32))[])":{"params":{"_shieldRequests":"Array of shield requests"}},"transact((((uint256,uint256),(uint256[2],uint256[2]),(uint256,uint256)),bytes32,bytes32[],bytes32[],(uint16,uint72,uint8,uint64,address,bytes32,(bytes32[4],bytes32,bytes32,bytes,bytes)[]),(bytes32,(uint8,address,uint256),uint120))[])":{"params":{"_transactions":"Array of transactions to process"}},"verify((((uint256,uint256),(uint256[2],uint256[2]),(uint256,uint256)),bytes32,bytes32[],bytes32[],(uint16,uint72,uint8,uint64,address,bytes32,(bytes32[4],bytes32,bytes32,bytes,bytes)[]),(bytes32,(uint8,address,uint256),uint120)))":{"details":"Called by TransactModule during delegatecall via staticcall to this router.      Performs the verification directly using stored verification keys and testingMode.","params":{"_transaction":"The transaction to verify"},"returns":{"_0":"True if proof is params.destinationCaller: Address allowed to call receiveMessage on Client (bytes32).        Use bytes32(0) to allow any relayer, or specify a relayer address for MEV protection.
params.finalRecipient: Address to receive USDC on client chain
params.maxFee: Maximum CCTP relayer fee in USDC raw units (deducted from burn amount at protocol level, 0 = no fee)

returns.startIndex: Starting leaf index within that tree
returns.treeNum: Tree number where commitments will be inserted

handleReceiveFinalizedMessage(uint32,byt.details: Called by TokenMessenger after CCTP attestation is verified and tokens minted.      USDC has already been minted to this contract.      Message format: BurnMessageV2 (see ICCTPV2.sol for byte layout)      - amount: Gross amount before fee deduction      - feeExecuted: Fee deducted (actualMint = amount - feeExecuted)      - hookData: Our CCTPPayload with shield data

params.finalityThresholdExecuted: The finality threshold that was met (>=2000 for finalized)
params.sender: Sender address on source chain (as bytes32, typically remote TokenMessenger)

returns._0: success Always returns true on success (reverts on failure)

handleReceiveUnfinalizedMessage(uint32,b.details: We don't support fast finality in the POC

params._leafHashes: Array of leaf hashes to insert

params.domain: CCTP domain ID of the remote chain
params.poolAddress: Address of the remote contract (as bytes32)

verify((((uint256,uint256),(uint256[2],u.details: Called by TransactModule during delegatecall via staticcall to this router.      Performs the verification directly using stored verification keys and testingMode.

atomicCrossChainUnshield((((uint256,uint.notice: Atomic cross-chain unshield to a client chain

getInsertionTreeNumberAndStartingIndex(u.notice: Get the tree number and starting index for new commitments

getVerificationKey(uint256,uint256).notice: Get a verification key for a specific circuit configuration

handleReceiveFinalizedMessage(uint32,byt.notice: Handle finalized CCTP message (cross-chain shields from Clients)

initialized().notice: Whether the contract has been initialized

insertLeaves(bytes32[]).notice: Insert leaves into the merkle tree

lastEventBlock().notice: Block number of last event (for wallet sync)

nextLeafIndex().notice: Index of next leaf to be inserted

nftFee().notice: NFT fee in basis points, default 0 for POC (required for SDK compatibility)

privilegedShieldCallers(address).notice: Addresses that bypass shield/unshield fees (e.g. yield adapter)

remotePools(uint32).notice: Mapping of remote CCTP domain -> remote PrivacyPool/Client address (as bytes32)

rootHistory(uint256,bytes32).notice: Historical merkle roots: treeNumber -> root -> isValid

setPrivilegedShieldCaller(address,bool).notice: Set privileged shield caller (bypasses shield/unshield fees)

setRemotePool(uint32,bytes32).notice: Set the address of a remote PrivacyPool/Client

setShieldFee(uint120).notice: Set the shield fee in basis points

setTreasury(address).notice: Set the treasury address for fee collection

setUnshieldFee(uint120).notice: Set the unshield fee in basis points

setVerificationKey(uint256,uint256,(stri.notice: Set a verification key for a circuit configuration

shield(((bytes32,(uint8,address,uint256).notice: Shield tokens into the privacy pool (local, same chain)

shieldFee().notice: Shield fee in basis points (100 = 1%), default 0 for POC

testingMode().notice: Testing mode flag - bypasses SNARK verification (POC only, DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION)

tokenBlocklist(address).notice: Blocklist of tokens that cannot be shielded

tokenIDMapping(bytes32).notice: Mapping from token ID hash to TokenData for NFTs

treeNumber().notice: Current tree number (increments when tree is full)

unshieldFee().notice: Unshield fee in basis points (100 = 1%), default 0 for POC

usdc().notice: USDC token address on this chain

zeros(uint256).notice: Zero values for each level of the tree
